mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=5) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_subsidy_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=4) AS totalApplicants, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND DATE(apply_time) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_subsidy_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND DATE(apply_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayNewApplicants, ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=5) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_subsidy_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=4) ) * 100.0 / NULLIF( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE is_deleted=0) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_subsidy_apply WHERE is_deleted=0) , 0) AS approvalRate, (SELECT SUM(approved_amount) FROM gc_subsidy_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=4) AS totalSubsidyAmount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=5) AS giftPackCount, -- 勤工助学指标 (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_work_study_position WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=2) AS wsTotalPositions, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM gc_work_study_apply WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=1) AS wsTotalApplications, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM gc_work_study_hire WHERE is_deleted=0 AND hire_status=1) AS wsTotalHired, ROUND( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(work_hours), 0) FROM gc_work_study_attendance WHERE is_deleted=0 AND MONTH(attendance_date)=MONTH(NOW())) / NULLIF( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) * 8 * 4 FROM gc_work_study_hire WHERE is_deleted=0 AND hire_status=1 AND MONTH(hire_date)=MONTH(NOW())) , 0) , 2) AS wsAttendanceRate, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(final_amount), 0) FROM gc_work_study_salary WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=3 AND salary_month=MONTH(NOW())) AS wsMonthlySalary, NOW() AS updateTime

SELECT c.college_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sa.status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sa.status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sa.id), 2) AS rate FROM gc_college c LEFT JOIN gc_student s ON c.id = s.college_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gc_gift_pack_apply sa ON s.id = sa.student_id AND sa.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.college_name ORDER BY rate DESC

SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(s.home_address, '省', 1) AS name, COUNT(s.id) AS value FROM gc_student s WHERE s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.id IN (SELECT student_id FROM gc_gift_pack_apply WHERE status = 5 AND is_deleted = 0) AND s.home_address LIKE '%省%' GROUP BY name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT CASE sa.subsidy_type WHEN 1 THEN '生活补助' WHEN 2 THEN '路费补助' WHEN 3 THEN '临时困难补助' ELSE '未知' END AS name, SUM(sa.approved_amount) AS value FROM gc_subsidy_apply sa WHERE sa.is_deleted = 0 AND sa.status = 4 GROUP BY sa.subsidy_type

SELECT YEAR(sa.apply_time) AS year, COUNT(sa.id) AS count, SUM(sa.approved_amount) AS amount FROM gc_subsidy_apply sa WHERE sa.is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(sa.apply_time) IN (#{currentYear}, #{currentYear}-1) GROUP BY YEAR(sa.apply_time) ORDER BY year

SELECT p.department_name AS ws_department, p.position_name AS ws_position_name, p.recruit_count AS ws_recruit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS ws_apply_count, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS ws_hired_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) * 100.0 / p.recruit_count, 2) AS ws_online_rate FROM gc_work_study_position p LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_apply a ON p.id = a.position_id AND a.is_deleted=0 LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_hire h ON p.id = h.position_id AND h.is_deleted=0 AND h.hire_status=1 WHERE p.is_deleted=0 AND p.status=2 GROUP BY p.id, p.department_name, p.position_name, p.recruit_count ORDER BY ws_online_rate DESC

SELECT c.college_name AS ws_college_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.student_id) AS ws_hired_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT h.student_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h2.student_id) FROM gc_work_study_hire h2 WHERE h2.is_deleted=0 AND h2.hire_status=1), 2) AS ws_ratio FROM gc_work_study_hire h LEFT JOIN gc_student s ON h.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gc_college c ON s.college_id = c.id WHERE h.is_deleted=0 AND h.hire_status=1 GROUP BY c.id, c.college_name ORDER BY ws_ratio DESC

SELECT CASE s.poverty_level WHEN 1 THEN '特别困难' WHEN 2 THEN '困难' WHEN 3 THEN '一般困难' ELSE '不困难' END AS ws_poverty_level, COUNT(DISTINCT h.student_id) AS ws_hired_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT h.student_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h2.student_id) FROM gc_work_study_hire h2 WHERE h2.is_deleted=0 AND h2.hire_status=1), 2) AS ws_ratio FROM gc_work_study_hire h LEFT JOIN gc_student s ON h.student_id = s.id WHERE h.is_deleted=0 AND h.hire_status=1 GROUP BY s.poverty_level ORDER BY s.poverty_level ASC

SELECT sal.salary_month AS ws_salary_month, SUM(sal.final_amount) AS ws_total_salary, ROUND(SUM(sal.final_amount) * 100.0 / SUM(p.recruit_count * p.salary_rate * 22 * 8), 2) AS ws_budget_exec_rate FROM gc_work_study_salary sal LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_position p ON sal.position_id = p.id WHERE sal.is_deleted=0 AND sal.status=3 GROUP BY sal.salary_month ORDER BY sal.salary_month DESC

SELECT b.academic_year AS ws_academic_year, b.semester AS ws_semester, SUM(sal.final_amount) AS ws_total_salary, ROUND(SUM(sal.final_amount) * 100.0 / SUM(p.recruit_count * p.salary_rate * 22 * 8 * 5), 2) AS ws_budget_exec_rate FROM gc_work_study_salary sal LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_position p ON sal.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_batch b ON p.batch_id = b.id WHERE sal.is_deleted=0 AND sal.status=3 GROUP BY b.academic_year, b.semester ORDER BY b.academic_year DESC, b.semester DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_positions, COALESCE(SUM(recruit_count), 0) AS planned_recruits, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_positions FROM gc_work_study_position WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT p.department_name AS dept_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS position_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.recruit_count), 0) AS plan_recruit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT app.id) AS apply_count, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS hire_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN h.hire_status = 1 THEN h.id END) AS on_job_count, CASE WHEN SUM(p.recruit_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN h.hire_status = 1 THEN h.id END) * 100.0 / SUM(p.recruit_count), 2) ELSE 0 END AS on_job_rate FROM gc_work_study_position p LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_apply app ON p.id = app.position_id AND app.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_hire h ON p.id = h.position_id AND h.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.batch_id = #{batchId} GROUP BY p.department_name ORDER BY p.department_name

SELECT c.college_name AS college_name, CASE s.poverty_level WHEN 1 THEN '特别困难' WHEN 2 THEN '困难' WHEN 3 THEN '一般困难' WHEN 4 THEN '不困难' ELSE '未知' END AS poverty_level_text, COUNT(DISTINCT h.student_id) AS student_count FROM gc_work_study_hire h INNER JOIN gc_student s ON h.student_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN gc_college c ON s.college_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE h.is_deleted = 0 AND s.college_id = #{collegeId} GROUP BY c.college_name, s.poverty_level ORDER BY c.college_name, s.poverty_level

SELECT sal.salary_year AS salary_year, sal.salary_month AS salary_month, COUNT(DISTINCT sal.student_id) AS paid_student_count, COALESCE(SUM(sal.final_amount), 0) AS total_salary_paid FROM gc_work_study_salary sal WHERE sal.is_deleted = 0 AND sal.status = 4 AND sal.salary_year = #{year} AND sal.salary_month = #{month} GROUP BY sal.salary_year, sal.salary_month ORDER BY sal.salary_year DESC, sal.salary_month DESC

SELECT p.department_name AS ws_department, p.position_name AS ws_position_name, s.name AS ws_student_name, c.college_name AS ws_college_name, s.poverty_level AS ws_poverty_level, COALESCE(att.total_hours, 0) AS ws_work_hours, COALESCE(sal.total_amount, 0) AS ws_salary FROM gc_work_study_position p LEFT JOIN gc_work_study_hire h ON p.id = h.position_id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gc_student s ON h.student_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN gc_college c ON s.college_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hire_id, SUM(work_hours) AS total_hours FROM gc_work_study_attendance WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY hire_id ) att ON h.id = att.hire_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hire_id, SUM(final_amount) AS total_amount FROM gc_work_study_salary WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (3, 4) GROUP BY hire_id ) sal ON h.id = sal.hire_id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = #{status} ORDER BY p.id, h.student_id
